DP.245.0000:
Buck: Hey!
[0103,0000], right?\f
Your zippity little buddy challenged
me to a battle earlier.\f
Yeah, I owned the little dude.
Made sure he was taught a lesson.\f
But I don’t know if I could beat
him again the next time.\f
Seriously, you’re bound to run into
tough Trainers wherever you go!\f
Anyway, I found out about this place,
but the Pokémon here are tough...\f
What do you say we team up and
go together?\f
DP.245.0002:
Buck: You won’t regret teaming up!
I’ll keep your Pokémon healthy!
DP.245.0003:
Buck: So, yeah, the Pokémon here
are tough...\f
What do you say we team up and
go together?\f
DP.245.0004:
Buck: Whoa, wait up!\f
I can’t go on by myself if you leave
me now.\f
Well, if you gotta go, you gotta go.
I’ll stick around here for you.\f
DP.245.0005:
Buck: There we go!
There’s the exit!\f
My instincts tell me the volcano’s
treasure is just ahead of us.\f
See you around, [0103,0000]!
You might be the toughest besides me!\f
